channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Congress on verge of making regulated dollar stablecoins act almost like digital cash
item.description: Washington isn't trying to solve every crypto policy fight at once, but it appears to be carving out a workable path for one specific category of digital asset: the regulated, dollar-pegged stablecoin...
item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.title: Garantex Successor Grinex Collapses Days After Coordinated Wallet Exploit
item.description: Hackers drained Grinex wallets and moved funds through SunSwap into TRX before consolidating assets into a single TRON address....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: 2026's biggest crypto exploit: $292 million gets drained from Kelp DAO with wrapped ether stranded across 20 chains
item.description: An attacker drained 116,500 rsETH, roughly 18% of circulating supply, from Kelp's LayerZero-powered bridge on Saturday, triggering emergency freezes across Aave, SparkLend, Fluid and Upshift....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Crypto to enter the US banking system through a backdoor, not through regulation
